prompt:
An air-driven sponge filter sized for a small aquarium: a dark cylindrical foam sponge with a rigid uplift tube and a small air inlet at the base. A short piece of 4 mm airline tubing and a simple check valve sit beside it, indicating how it connects to an air pump.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a clean near-future home aquaria aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, minimal clutter, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Center the sponge filter so its foam texture and tube silhouette read clearly at icon scale.
